---
title: "Yashvi Mittal"
---

Hi! I'm **Yashvi Mittal**, a Master's student at **Baruch College**.
This site collects my coursework and mini-projects for STA 9750
(Software Tools for Data Analysis), Fall 2025.

## Projects

- [**Mini-Project #01: Fiscal Characteristics of Major US Public Transit Systems**](mp01.html) - farebox recovery and operating efficiency among U.S. transit systems.
- [**Mini-Project #02: The Business of Show Business**](mp2.html) - data-driven movie development using IMDb title, rating, and personnel data.
- [**Mini-Project: The Electoral College**](mp3.html) - analysis of U.S. presidential and House election data, 1976-2024.
- [**Mini-Project #04: Exploring Recent US Political Shifts**](mp04.html) - county-level 2020-2024 presidential election shifts from Wikipedia and Census shapefiles.
- [**Mini-Project: The Ultimate Playlist**](playlistmp.html) - data-driven playlist curation from song characteristics and user-generated playlists.
- [**Individual Project: CUNY Retirement Plan Analysis**](InteractiveMonteCarlo.html) - Monte Carlo decision support for new CUNY faculty choosing between retirement plans.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

if (!require("leaflet")) {
  options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
  install.packages("leaflet")
  stopifnot(require("leaflet"))
}

baruch_longitude <- -73.98333
baruch_latitude  <- +40.74028

leaflet() |>
  addTiles() |>
  setView(baruch_longitude, baruch_latitude, zoom = 17) |>
  addPopups(
    baruch_longitude,
    baruch_latitude,
    "I am a Master's student at <b>Baruch College</b>!"
  )
```

---

Last Updated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%A %m %d, %Y at %H:%M%p")`
